info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Processing API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API facilitates the seamless management of financial transactions within the platform. It allows businesses to initiate and process various types of transactions, ensuring accuracy and compliance with financial regulations. Typical consumers of this API include financial institutions, e-commerce platforms, and payment processors looking to enhance their transaction capabilities. This API offers reliable and secure transaction handling tailored to meet the needs of modern business operations.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new transaction in the system. Provide the necessary details in the request body to successfully carry out the operation.

requestBody.description: This request body contains the necessary data to create a new transaction. Ensure that the data adheres to the defined schema for successful transaction processing.

200.description: Request completed successfully, transaction details returned.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction was made.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction, such as 'credit' or 'debit'.

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is made, e.g., 'USD'.

status.description: The current status of the transaction, such as 'completed' or 'pending'.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Response object for a successful transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transactions POST Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message providing more information about the error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace identifying the point of failure in the code.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for correcting the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Represents the error response returned when a POST operation for transactions fails.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.title: Error Details

accountNumber.description: The account number related to the transaction.

errorCode.description: The specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the specifics of the error.
message.example: No account found for the provided account number.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Contains detailed information regarding the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction will be made.

transactionType.description: The type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer).

amount.description: The amount of money to be transacted.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is to be made (e.g., USD, EUR).

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary (if applicable).

transactionDate.description: The date the transaction is scheduled to occur.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Post Response 404

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates the status of the request; false indicates an error.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the API request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of a response for a 404 error that occurs during the transaction POST operation.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
